context.goal: Validate the basic combinational mapping of inputs to outputs for a random legal stimulus.
stimulus_intent: Drive a representative legal input pattern across known inputs: ['a', 'b', 'aluc']
Apply random legal values to a, b and a representative set of aluc opcodes.
timing_assumptions: Do not infer internal state or undocumented storage.
Observe outputs after a small stabilization period; no fixed-cycle timing assumed.

llm_todo_blocks.end_marker: # TODO(cocoverify2:stimulus) END block_id=stimulus_basic_001 case_id=basic_001
instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.
llm_todo_blocks.start_marker: # TODO(cocoverify2:stimulus) BEGIN block_id=stimulus_basic_001 case_id=basic_001

context.goal: Exercise boundary values for shift amounts and operand extremes.
stimulus_intent: Use zero-like, one-like, and boundary patterns on ['a', 'b', 'aluc']
Drive a and b with 0x00000000, 0xFFFFFFFF, 0x80000000, 0x7FFFFFFF and set aluc to each shift opcode with shift amounts 0 and 31.
timing_assumptions: Do not infer internal state or undocumented storage.
Observe outputs after inputs settle; no sequential timing assumed.

llm_todo_blocks.end_marker: # TODO(cocoverify2:stimulus) END block_id=stimulus_edge_001 case_id=edge_001
instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.
llm_todo_blocks.start_marker: # TODO(cocoverify2:stimulus) BEGIN block_id=stimulus_edge_001 case_id=edge_001

context.goal: Verify that undefined opcodes produce a high‑impedance result as specified.
stimulus_intent: Drive aluc with an undefined opcode (e.g., 6'b111111) while providing arbitrary legal a and b values.
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs after input stabilization; no cycle‑accurate timing assumed.

llm_todo_blocks.end_marker: # TODO(cocoverify2:stimulus) END block_id=stimulus_negative_001 case_id=negative_001
instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.
llm_todo_blocks.start_marker: # TODO(cocoverify2:stimulus) BEGIN block_id=stimulus_negative_001 case_id=negative_001

context.goal: Exercise each supported ALU operation with representative operand values.
stimulus_intent: Iterate over all defined aluc opcodes, applying a set of typical operand pairs for each.
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs after inputs settle; no sequential latency assumed.

llm_todo_blocks.end_marker: # TODO(cocoverify2:stimulus) END block_id=stimulus_basic_002 case_id=basic_002

generated_files.description: Marks the rendered cocotb test directory as a Python package.
Conservative DUT interface helpers derived from the contract artifact.
Thin environment wrapper that composes interface, timing-safe waits, and coverage helpers.
Structured oracle helper functions rendered from the oracle artifact.
Coverage scaffold rendered from plan coverage tags for later execution stages.
Rendered basic cocotb tests aligned to structured plan cases.
Rendered edge cocotb tests aligned to structured plan cases.
Phase 4 executable Makefile shell; Phase 5 injects run-time variables and executes it.

render_warnings: Rendered Makefile is an executable Phase 4 shell; Phase 5 injects execution variables and selects the backend.
Task description was provided to the render stage but not used to invent new testbench semantics.
Spec text was provided to the render stage but only upstream artifacts were trusted for code generation.
